title: Baklava
instructions: Mix nuts with sugar and cinnamon.
Make syrup and pour hot over cold baklava.

reviews.text: Perfect baklava! Added a splash of lemon juice and a pinch of cardamom to the syrup. Also added a dash of rose water and topped with extra pistachios.
Used walnuts instead of pistachios. Added extra cinnamon and a pinch of clove. Served with vanilla ice cream.
Perfect recipe! Followed it exactly and turned out great. Will make again.
Really good recipe. My family loved it. Simple to follow.
It was okay. Nothing special but edible. Might make again with changes.
Didn't work for me. Flavor was off and texture was wrong.
